name: Dota News and Updates
snippet: News Updates. April 7, 2026 . 7.41 b Gameplay Patch . Patch 7.41 b is out now and you can check out the patch notes here. March 31, 2026. Dota 2 Update - 3/31/2026.

name: Dota News and Updates
snippet: Patch 7.41 is out now and you can check out the patch notes here. In addition, we've made the following improvements and bug fixes: Added an overhead indicator ...

name: Prediction: 7.42 adds facets back in : r/DotA2
snippet: Prediction for future patch change: Facet picks are being removed now just to be introduced in future patches as Shards and Aghanim scepter ...

name: Dota 2 update for 7 April 2026
snippet: 7 Apr 2026 — Build 22671097 on 7 April 2026 ... There are no official patch notes available for this build besides the list of changed files in 5 depots.

name: Valve is trolling again. Patch 7.42 just dropped FACETS
snippet: Rather than deal with the balancing headache, Valve has stripped Facets out of Dota 2 after just 10 months. Was this the right call?
